results.rendered_html:
akṣudhya a. [akṣudhe hitaṃ; akṣudh -yat.] Ved.
1 That which tends to cause absence of hunger (kṣudhābhāvasādhanaṃ dravyaṃ).
2 Not liable to hunger.
